datasets.title: Zlewnie ostrzeżeń hydrologicznych IMGW (II aPGW JCWP)
datasets.provider: Państwowe Gospodarstwo Wodne Wody Polskie (PGW WP) — II aktualizacja planów gospodarowania wodami (II aPGW / IIaPGW); mapowanie kod_zlewni: MeteoLens
datasets.license_note: II aPGW spatial layers on dane.gov.pl dataset 599 are published under Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International (CC BY 4.0). Redistribution of derived catchment polygons is allowed with attribution to PGW Wody Polskie / II aPGW.
datasets.attribution: Zlewnie JCWP: II aktualizacja planów gospodarowania wodami (aPGW), © PGW Wody Polskie (CC BY 4.0); mapowanie IMGW kod_zlewni i uproszczenie geometrii: MeteoLens.
datasets.redistribution_note: Redistribution of this simplified derivative is allowed under CC BY 4.0 with attribution to PGW Wody Polskie / II aPGW and a processed-data notice. Do not present the polygons as official cadastral or legal catchment boundaries.
datasets.update_cadence: II aPGW catchment layers are published as a versioned national planning dataset (Geobaza II aPGW). Refresh by re-exporting Zlewnie_JCWP_rzecznych from the current GDB, re-running scripts/geometry/convert_apgw_hydro_basins.py against a fresh warningshydro snapshot, and re-importing.
datasets.known_limitations: One Feature per dissolved JCWP set mapped from IMGW kod_zlewni via the MPHP hydro id embedded in RW*/LW*/CW*/TW* JCWP codes; short MPHP cores (<3 digits) and unions exceeding 80 JCWP catchments stay explicitly unresolved; coastal/sea codes with core 0 have no MPHP match; geometry is further simplified (~0.012 deg) for map delivery; not suitable for legal or flood-defence engineering use.
datasets.dataset_version: II aPGW Geobaza ver_20230915 Zlewnie_JCWP_rzecznych; MeteoLens dissolve+simplify 2026-07-20; warning snapshot mapped against live warningshydro codes

review.notes: Uses CC BY 4.0 II aPGW JCWP catchments from dane.gov.pl dataset 599 instead of unverified MPHP redistribution; IMGW kod_zlewni mapping via embedded MPHP hydro IDs documented in docs/geometry/GEOMETRY_SOURCES.md; unresolved codes remain explicit.

datasets.title: Stacje synoptyczne – współrzędne WMO OSCAR/Surface
datasets.provider: World Meteorological Organization (WMO) – OSCAR/Surface; station IDs cross-referenced with IMGW-PIB current SYNOP endpoint
datasets.license_note: WMO Resolution 1 commits WMO to free and unrestricted international exchange of Earth-system data. WMO wis2box documentation identifies OSCAR/Surface as the key station-metadata resource and documents caching OSCAR station metadata by WIGOS ID. This reviewed import contains station coordinates/metadata resolved from public OSCAR/Surface search responses and must keep WMO/OSCAR attribution.
datasets.attribution: Współrzędne stacji synoptycznych: WMO OSCAR/Surface; identyfikatory stacji i dane pomiarowe: IMGW-PIB; przetworzenie: MeteoLens.
datasets.redistribution_note: Public redistribution is treated as allowed with attribution under the reviewed WMO data-policy and OSCAR/Surface station-metadata caching guidance. Commercial-use clearance is not asserted by MeteoLens; re-review current WMO/OSCAR terms before commercial deployment or downstream redistribution.
datasets.update_cadence: Manual reviewed refresh. Re-run scripts/geometry/fetch_oscar_synop_stations.py against the current IMGW SYNOP station list and re-import with python -m app.geometry.import_cli.
datasets.known_limitations: Coordinates come from WMO OSCAR/Surface station metadata resolved by WIGOS ID pattern 0-20000-0-<IMGW id_stacji>. This import covers the 62 stations present in the IMGW current SYNOP endpoint during the 2026-07-07 refresh. Station metadata can change independently of IMGW observations; not suitable for cadastral/legal positioning.
datasets.dataset_version: OSCAR/Surface public search API fetched 2026-07-07; IMGW SYNOP station list observed 2026-07-07 20:00 Europe/Warsaw

review.notes: Official WMO pages describe OSCAR as WMO's global repository of observing-system capabilities, and WMO wis2box docs document fetching/caching station metadata from OSCAR/Surface by WIGOS ID. WMO Unified Data Policy Resolution 1 documents free and unrestricted Earth-system data exchange. Live verification on 2026-07-07 resolved all 62 current IMGW SYNOP station IDs through OSCAR WIGOS IDs.

datasets.title: Powiaty – granice administracyjne (PRG)
datasets.provider: Główny Urząd Geodezji i Kartografii (GUGiK) – Państwowy Rejestr Granic (PRG); SHP mirror: GIS Support sp. z o.o.
datasets.license_note: PRG boundary data is free public data under art. 40a ust. 2 pkt 1 of the Polish Geodetic and Cartographic Law (Prawo geodezyjne i kartograficzne); free for any use, including commercial, with source attribution.
datasets.attribution: Granice administracyjne: Państwowy Rejestr Granic (PRG), © GUGiK; kopia SHP: gis-support.pl; uproszczenie geometrii: MeteoLens.
datasets.redistribution_note: Redistribution of PRG-derived boundaries is allowed with source attribution. This file is a simplified derivative and must stay labelled as processed data in UI, screenshots, and exports.
datasets.update_cadence: PRG is updated continuously by GUGiK. This import uses the PRG snapshot with WERSJA_OD 2022 (GIS Support 2022 SHP package). Refresh by downloading a newer PRG export, re-running scripts/geometry/convert_prg_shapefiles.py, and re-importing.
datasets.known_limitations: Geometry simplified with Douglas-Peucker (tolerance 200 m), so small boundary slivers/gaps between neighbouring counties can occur; a 2022 snapshot, so later administrative boundary changes are not reflected; not suitable for legal or cadastral use.
datasets.dataset_version: PRG WERSJA_OD 2022; GIS Support SHP 2022-12-22; MeteoLens simplification 2026-07-04

review.notes: Official public PRG data via GIS Support SHP mirror; legal basis and attribution documented in docs/geometry/GEOMETRY_SOURCES.md and LEGAL_ATTRIBUTION.md.

datasets.title: Województwa – granice administracyjne (PRG)
datasets.provider: Główny Urząd Geodezji i Kartografii (GUGiK) – Państwowy Rejestr Granic (PRG); SHP mirror: GIS Support sp. z o.o.
datasets.license_note: PRG boundary data is free public data under art. 40a ust. 2 pkt 1 of the Polish Geodetic and Cartographic Law (Prawo geodezyjne i kartograficzne); free for any use, including commercial, with source attribution.
datasets.attribution: Granice administracyjne: Państwowy Rejestr Granic (PRG), © GUGiK; kopia SHP: gis-support.pl; uproszczenie geometrii: MeteoLens.
datasets.redistribution_note: Redistribution of PRG-derived boundaries is allowed with source attribution. This file is a simplified derivative and must stay labelled as processed data in UI, screenshots, and exports.
datasets.update_cadence: PRG is updated continuously by GUGiK. This import uses the PRG snapshot with WERSJA_OD 2022-06-13 (GIS Support 2022 SHP package). Refresh by downloading a newer PRG export, re-running scripts/geometry/convert_prg_shapefiles.py, and re-importing.
datasets.known_limitations: Geometry simplified with Douglas-Peucker (tolerance 500 m), so small boundary slivers/gaps between neighbouring units can occur; a 2022 snapshot, so later administrative boundary changes are not reflected; not suitable for legal or cadastral use.
datasets.dataset_version: PRG WERSJA_OD 2022-06-13; GIS Support SHP 2022-12-22; MeteoLens simplification 2026-07-04

review.notes: Official public PRG data via GIS Support SHP mirror; legal basis and attribution documented in docs/geometry/GEOMETRY_SOURCES.md and LEGAL_ATTRIBUTION.md.
